purpose: Ensure every transferable function from the three visual source skills is owned by the correct WorkBuddy runtime skill without copying source assets or prompts.

cases.prompt: 帮我诊断这张旧封面，并给出一版新的完整封面方案。
cases.expect: cover anchor diagnoses information density, visual anchor, thumbnail readability, color contrast and trust before returning a truthful redesigned-cover plan

cases.prompt: 给 Citywalk 视频做一张小红书封面，想要白描边、手帐贴纸和路线涂鸦。
cases.expect: cover anchor selects the lifestyle doodle-outline variant while retaining factual title and source boundaries

cases.prompt: 为这篇文章规划 5 张小黑正文配图，先不要生图。
cases.expect: xiaohei illustration returns a 4-8-shot 16:9 plan with one cognition anchor and one non-copied metaphor per image

cases.prompt: 为“信任是一块证据一块证据铺过去”做一张正文配图。
cases.expect: xiaohei illustration uses the 小黑 role in the central action, white background, black linework and restrained three-color annotations

cases.prompt: 给“下班后学习”配一张 3:4 黑白铅笔人物叙事图，顶部留标题空间。
cases.expect: xiaohei illustration uses the explicitly requested pencil_narrative alternative with a non-specific person, while retaining 小黑 as the default source-aligned mode

cases.prompt: 把这张普通柱状图重画成能放进报告的材质图，所有数值和坐标都不能改。
cases.expect: material illustration extracts invariants, requires chart-accuracy QA and redraws semantics rather than source styling
